scores.correctness_notes: Events are roughly correct (certificate_available/certificate_denied correspond to CertificateAvailableEvent/CertificateDeniedEvent), but misses the revocation trigger and request_errors error codes from the gold standard. The automatic 90% renewal is not mentioned in the gold standard and may be fabricated.
scores.hallucination_notes: Several specific API details are suspicious: 'tls_certificates v4' (gold standard references v1), 'CertificateRequestAttributes', 'renewal_relative_time' parameter, 'requirer.renew_certificate(cert)', and the '90% validity period' auto-renewal claim are all absent from the gold standard and likely from a different or fictional version of the library.
